translations.Group \"%1$s\" is used in the Auto Group: Group "%1$s" is used in the Auto Groups App and cannot be deleted.
translations.Automatically adds all users to one or m: Automatically adds all users to one or multiple specified groups.
translations.Automatically add all users to these gro: Automatically add all users to these groups.
translations.Users which are member of at least one o: Users which are member of at least one of these groups are removed from the auto groups. This is also the case if the user is added to one of these groups after creation, i.e., membership in the override groups is checked after each group modification.
translations.Set Auto Group membership on user creati: Set Auto Group membership on user creation.
translations.If checked, Auto Group membership will b: If checked, Auto Group membership will be enforced on user creation.
translations.Check Auto Group membership on modificat: Check Auto Group membership on modification of a user's groups.
translations.If checked, Auto Group membership will b: If checked, Auto Group membership will be re-enforced for a user account every time it is added to or removed from a group.
translations.Check for correct Auto Group membership: Check for correct Auto Group membership on every login.
translations.Enable this setting to enforce proper Au: Enable this setting to enforce proper Auto Group membership on every successful login. This is useful if either users are not created in Nextcloud (e.g., with external user backends) or to enforce correct group membership for all users when the Auto Groups / Override Groups have changed.
